'''yatulu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:chaffie|chaffie]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-t-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:chaffie|chaffie]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| yatulu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:yætilith|yætilith]] || [[word:yætilij|yætilij]] || [[word:yætilish|yætilish]] || [[word:yætili|yætili]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:yatutuluth|yatutuluth]] || [[word:yatutuluj|yatutuluj]] || [[word:yatutulush|yatutulush]] || [[word:yatutulu|yatutulu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:yatuluth|yatuluth]] || [[word:yatuluj|yatuluj]] || [[word:yatulush|yatulush]] || [[word:yatulu|yatulu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:yatufluth|yatufluth]] || [[word:yatufluj|yatufluj]] || [[word:yatuflush|yatuflush]] || [[word:yatufluf|yatufluf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:yatuluthu|yatuluthu]] || [[word:yatuluju|yatuluju]] || [[word:yatulushu|yatulushu]] || [[word:yatuluku|yatuluku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:yatuluth|yatuluth]] || [[word:yatuluj|yatuluj]] || [[word:yatulush|yatulush]] || [[word:yatulu|yatulu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:yatuluthul|yatuluthul]] || [[word:yatulujul|yatulujul]] || [[word:yatulushul|yatulushul]] || [[word:yatulukul|yatulukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:yatuluthuthu|yatuluthuthu]] || [[word:yatulujuju|yatulujuju]] || [[word:yatulushushu|yatulushushu]] || [[word:yatuluku|yatuluku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:yatuluthun|yatuluthun]] || [[word:yatulujun|yatulujun]] || [[word:yatulushun|yatulushun]] || [[word:yatulukun|yatulukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:yatuluthuoro|yatuluthuoro]] || [[word:yatulujuoro|yatulujuoro]] || [[word:yatulushuoro|yatulushuoro]] || [[word:yatulukuoro|yatulukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|bfc4f79}}
